---
title: "AMS597 Project Data Cleaning"
author: "Group 1"
date: "2026-03-12"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Loading Libraries
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r}
df <- read.csv("data/processed/glassdoor_reviews_with_sector_revised.csv")
str(df)
dim(df)
colSums(is.na(df))
```
